chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-300 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No. 3400/2023 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No. 3401/2023 4. For hearing of main case 03.04.2023. Mr. Suhail Shahzad Khokhar, advocate for applicants along with applicants. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is stated that applicants are innocent but have been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicants want to surrender before the trial court but need protection as they apprehend their arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- each and PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 09.04.2023 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
